呢點最重要 唔可以就咁就當講完 搵人幫我鞏固返呢點

強調香港係法治社會 黑社會無法無天

21/7 元朗黑社會針對反送中市民

Send信去各大領事館
向香港發旅遊警示

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am a concerned citizen of Hong Kong. I saw some of the latest events in my town, and genuinely shocked and I think you should warn you citizens about some imminent dangers.

On Sunday night, some protestor and even train passengers on a MTR train, HK's metro, were gruesomely attacked by communists hired thugs, in Yuen Long, a suburb of Hong Kong.

The online rumours says the thugs will travel all over parts of HK's New Territories.

and here are some video for your references:
https://www.facebook.com/standnewshk/videos/407353793207073/
https://www.facebook.com/LamCheukTing.Official/videos/547539255780791/

The second video is a live of Hong Kong's MP, even he was brutally attacked.

so we would like you to advice your citizens ASAP:
a. Avoid Hong Kong's New Territories in total, especially Yuen Long
b. Avoid Hong Kong's MTR unless necessary, they fail to protect passengers, even their own staff.

To avoid anyone get hurt, we urge you act swiftly to send warning to your fellow citizens.

Best regards,Dear Sir/Madam,

On Sunday night, some protestor and even train passengers on a MTR train, HK's metro, were gruesomely attacked by communists hired thugs, in Yuen Long, a suburb of Hong Kong.

so we would like you to advice your citizens ASAP:
